description: In a flashback, May tracks the package from the train's rooftop but is attacked by enemy agents and forced to parachute into the countryside. After escaping, she finds Coulson and Ward paralyzed by the grenade’s effects. Captured by Russo and his men, May is tortured but learns Russo is corrupt. She regains the upper hand in a burst of action, taking out all her captors before returning to the Bus, visibly wounded, where Coulson tenderly helps her patch up, and Ward looks on, troubled by their closeness.

transcript.line: Ward, you're up. Ward? Something's wrong. Cybertek's leaving the dining car. Ward, Coulson...
Fitz? Skye? Can anyone read me?
I've got to get you guys somewhere safe.
We've been looking for you, Agent May.

Get your bearings, sweetheart. Get your bearings. There you go. There you go. I realize you're confused. But I'm here to help. You see, I make sure Cybertek products move across Italy without incident. They make sure I'm well taken care of. And they'll take care of you, too. All you have to do is tell me where Agent Coulson and Ward are. That's it. Why are you smiling?
Fine. Have it your way. Just remember, your boss asked to be part of this op. I warned him against it. So if you're looking for someone to blame, look to him.
If it's really just sex, Ward... you should get more comfortable using the word.
Agent Coulson, it's going to be all right. We found your people. The train, it's...
You okay? You were on the train when it disappeared.
May, Russo was... Explain yourself, please.
